_note: SAMPLE DATA — every date, time, and venue below is a placeholder to verify or replace before launch. See README.md. Use admin.html to generate new entries.

events.title: Kibler Valley River Run
events.description: Annual whitewater release on the Dan River through Kibler Valley. Kayaking, tubing, food vendors, and live music in one of the prettiest hollows in the county.

events.title: Stuart Farmers' Market
events.description: Local produce, meats, eggs, baked goods, and crafts from Patrick County farms and makers. Every Friday morning through October.

events.title: Old-Time Music & Craft Demonstrations at Mabry Mill
events.description: Sunday afternoon old-time and bluegrass music with traditional craft demonstrations at the most photographed spot on the Blue Ridge Parkway.

events.title: Summer Concert Series at DeHart Park
events.description: Bring a lawn chair for an evening of live music at DeHart Park. Concessions available; kids' playground on site.

events.title: Guided Fairy Stone Hunt & Junior Ranger Day
events.description: Ranger-led hunt for the famous staurolite 'fairy stone' crosses, plus Junior Ranger activities for kids. Meet at the park office.

events.title: Beach Music Festival
events.description: An afternoon of beach music and shag dancing under the trees at DeHart Park. Food vendors, cornhole, and family fun.

events.title: Lawn Concert at Reynolds Homestead
events.description: Evening concert on the lawn of the historic Reynolds Homestead. Picnics welcome; tours of the 1843 home before the show.

events.title: Stargazing at the Primland Observatory
events.description: Guided night-sky viewing from Primland's mountaintop observatory — some of the darkest skies in Virginia. Reservations required.

events.title: Patrick County Agricultural Fair
events.description: The county fair: livestock shows, exhibits, carnival rides, demolition derby, fair food, and a week of small-town fun.

events.title: Apple Dumpling Festival
events.description: Fall festival in downtown Stuart with fresh apple dumplings, craft and food vendors, live music, and kids' activities.

events.title: Trunk or Treat
events.description: Safe family trick-or-treating from decorated trunks downtown. Costume contest and candy for the kids.

events.title: Veterans Day Ceremony
events.description: Community ceremony honoring Patrick County veterans, with color guard, guest speakers, and taps at the eleventh hour.

events.title: Stuart Christmas Parade
events.description: Floats, fire trucks, marching bands, and Santa himself rolling down Main Street to kick off the Christmas season.
